predictions.forecast_value: Fed will initially overtighten then pivot to live with higher inflation
predictions.source_quote: We see the Fed initially slamming the brakes... We see it ultimately pivoting to live with higher inflation.

predictions.variable: US Core CPI / Core PCE inflation
predictions.forecast_value: persistently above 2% target even after central banks pause
predictions.source_quote: We expect inflation to cool but stay persistently higher than central bank targets of 2%.

predictions.forecast_value: rising further as term premium is restored
predictions.source_quote: We see yields on long-term U.S. Treasuries rising further as term premium is restored.
We are neutral Chinese equities. Activity is restarting, but we see 2022 growth below official targets.
